title: The Awakening of Motti Wolkenbruch
original_title: Wolkenbruchs wunderliche Reise in die Arme einer Schickse
overview: The young Orthodox Jew, Motti Wolkenbruch, finds himself at a turning point. His beloved mother wants him to get married and presents one marriage candidate after the other. Unfortunately none of the woman pleases him, because they all look just like her. The situation gets even more complicated, when Motti secretly falls in love with the non-Jewish girl Laura, a so-called Shiksa.

trailers.title: LE MERVEILLEUX VOYAGE DE WOLKENBRUCH Bande Annonce
